testcase.name: @BeforeTest openbrowser
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.WebDriverException: Reached error page: about:neterror?e=netTimeout&u=http%3A//192.168.239.129%3A8080/&c=UTF-8&d=The%20server%20at%20192.168.239.129%20is%20taking%20too%20long%20to%20respond.&a= Build info: version: '4.34.0', revision: '707dcb4246*' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.8' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.firefox.FirefoxDriver Command: [0ef97497-fbf6-4a5f-9ebd-1201ab254601, get {url=http://192.168.239.129:8080}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: true, browserName: firefox, browserVersion: 148.0, moz:accessibilityChecks: false, moz:buildID: 20260216153405, moz:geckodriverVersion: 0.36.0, moz:headless: false, moz:platformVersion: 10.0, moz:processID: 24568, moz:profile: C:\Users\NSANDE~1\AppData\L..., moz:shutdownTimeout: 60000, moz:webdriverClick: true, moz:windowless: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, userAgent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10....} Session ID: 0ef97497-fbf6-4a5f-9ebd-1201ab254601 at org.openqa.selenium.remote.ErrorCodec.decode(ErrorCodec.java:167) at org.openqa.selenium.remote.codec.w3c.W3CHttpResponseCodec.decode(W3CHttpResponseCodec.java:138) at org.openqa.selenium.remote.codec.w3c.W3CHttpResponseCodec.decode(W3CHttpResponseCodec.java:50) at org.openqa.selenium.remote.HttpCommandExecutor.execute(HttpCommandExecutor.java:215) at org.openqa.selenium.remote.service.DriverCommandExecutor.invokeExecute(DriverCommandExecutor.java:216) at org.openqa.selenium.remote.service.DriverCommandExecutor.execute(DriverCommandExecutor.java:174) at org.openqa.selenium.remote.RemoteWebDriver.execute(RemoteWebDriver.java:544) at org.openqa.selenium.remote.RemoteWebDriver.get(RemoteWebDriver.java:312) at com.zoho.generic.BaseClass.openbrowser(BaseClass.java:32) ...
